network_summary: Robert Stites is NOT an owner or dentist — he is the Contracting, Credentialing & Payor Strategies specialist at DecisionOne Dental Partners (DSO HQ Itasca IL), founded by brothers Dr. AJ Acierno (CEO) and Dr. Mike Acierno (CMO). Stites appears as NPPES authorized official on affiliated practice NPIs because he manages credentialing for the network. DecisionOne Dental Partners self-describes as a DSO, operates 35+ locations across IL and WI, and is affiliated/partnered with Smile Brands (a PE-backed DSO, currently backed by New Mountain Capital, previously Gryphon Investors). The footer of decisiononedental.com references Smile Brands' Code of Conduct confirming operational integration. SOUTH PARK ORTHO PLLC (401 W Talcott, Park Ridge) is an orthodontic specialist practice (DiFranco Orthodontics / South Park Orthodontics, owned by Dr. Paul DiFranco) — excluded from GP denominator as specialist network. PARK RIDGE DENTISTRY PLLC (35.5 S Prospect, Park Ridge) and JEFFERSON PARK FAMILY DENTAL LLC (4452 N Central, Chicago 60630) are GP practices operating under the DecisionOne DSO umbrella.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. AJ Acierno (CEO) and Dr. Michael Acierno (CMO/President), co-founders of DecisionOne Dental Partners; Robert Stites is credentialing/contracting staff, not an owner.
legal_entities: DecisionOne Dental Partners (HQ: 300 Park Blvd #175, Itasca IL 60143)
durable_artifacts: Shared NPPES authorized official 'ROBERT STITES' across 3 NPIs (1396319711, 1366195869, 1417528589) spanning ZIPs 60068 and 60630
Robert Stites listed on decisiononedental.com/support-team as 'Contracting, Credentialing & Payor Strategies' — AO role explained by credentialing function, not ownership
decisiononedental.com confirms Park Ridge location at 35.5 S Prospect Ave, matching PARK RIDGE DENTISTRY PLLC exactly
decisiononedental.com confirms Chicago Jefferson Park location, matching JEFFERSON PARK FAMILY DENTAL LLC at 4452 N Central Ave
DecisionOne Dental Partners footer references Smile Brands Code of Conduct — operational integration with PE-backed Smile Brands (New Mountain Capital)
mso_platform_pe_evidence: DecisionOne Dental Partners is a self-described DSO (decisiononedental.com: 'combining clinical autonomy of private practice with cost efficiencies inherent in a DSO'). The website footer references Smile Brands' Code of Conduct confirming affiliation. Smile Brands is PE-backed (Gryphon Investors acquisition documented at gryphon-inv.com/news/gryphon-investors-acquires-smile-brands/, current backer reported as New Mountain Capital per drbicuspid.com 2026). DecisionOne HQ: 300 Park Blvd #175, Itasca IL 60143. Source: https://www.decisiononedental.com/ and https://www.decisiononedental.com/support-team
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Robert Stites is a CREDENTIALING ADMINISTRATOR at DecisionOne Dental Partners, not an independent dentist-owner. The AO cluster is a FALSE POSITIVE for dentist_multi — it is actually a DSO-network signal. SOUTH PARK ORTHO PLLC is a specialist (orthodontic) practice operated by Dr. Paul DiFranco under the DiFranco Orthodontics / South Park Orthodontics brand — it should NOT be in the GP denominator regardless of DSO affiliation. JEFFERSON PARK FAMILY DENTAL LLC at 4452 N Central Ave 60630 now appears to operate as 'Jefferson Park Dental Studio' (confirmed by Yelp and practice website dentistinjeffersonpark.com) — may be a name change post-affiliation or a successor tenant; address match is confirmed.
evidence_chain: AO signal: NPPES shows 'ROBERT STITES' as authorized official on 3 NPIs across ZIPs 60068 and 60630 (reach=3). Web search identified Robert Stites on LinkedIn as affiliated with DecisionOne Dental Partners and on ZoomInfo with email domain @decisiononedental.com as 'Insurance Coordinator at Acierno Dental.' Fetching decisiononedental.com/support-team confirmed 'Rob Stites' is listed under 'Contracting, Credentialing & Payor Strategies' — a non-ownership administrative role explaining his NPPES AO presence. Fetching decisiononedental.com confirmed DecisionOne is a DSO with 35+ IL/WI locations, including explicit mentions of Park Ridge (2 locations, one at 35.5 S Prospect Ave) and Chicago Jefferson Park — matching 2 of the 3 AO-cluster addresses exactly. The site footer references Smile Brands Code of Conduct confirming DSO platform affiliation. Smile Brands is PE-backed (Gryphon/New Mountain Capital). SOUTH PARK ORTHO PLLC confirmed as orthodontic specialist via Yelp/DiFranco Orthodontics listings — specialist exclusion applied.
future_app_notes: DecisionOne Dental Partners operates 35+ IL/WI locations — a systematic sweep of all Chicagoland watched-IL ZIPs against the DecisionOne location list (decisiononedental.com or Glassdoor/Indeed location pages) would likely surface additional GP practices currently classified independent. The DecisionOne-Smile Brands relationship should be documented in the pe_sponsors / platforms table. Any other NPIs with Robert Stites as authorized official in the DB are almost certainly additional DecisionOne affiliates. The JEFFERSON PARK FAMILY DENTAL LLC → Jefferson Park Dental Studio name change should be investigated to confirm it's the same operating entity (same owner, same DecisionOne affiliation) rather than a new operator at that address.
